title: adinandra coarctata
intro: Adinandra coarctata, also known as the Borneo cherry or mountain cherry, is a species of plant in the family Theaceae. It is a small to medium-sized tree or shrub native to Borneo and is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Adinandra coarctata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves and roots can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams.
